description: Roll 1d10 + Progress Points. Use this column for Categories that build toward a conclusion over a shorter, faster arc. Used with the Event Crafter system from Mythic Magazine #62.

descriptionTranslations.en: Roll 1d10 + Progress Points. Use this column for Categories that build toward a conclusion over a shorter, faster arc. Used with the Event Crafter system from Mythic Magazine #62.

entries.description: The Element is "None" unless it makes no sense with this Event, in which case it's Expected.

descriptionTranslations.en: The Element is "None" unless it makes no sense with this Event, in which case it's Expected.

entries.description: The Element is what you would most expect for this Category in this Event, considering the Context of the adventure.

descriptionTranslations.en: The Element is what you would most expect for this Category in this Event, considering the Context of the adventure.

entries.description: Roll on Meaning Tables to interpret the Element. Consider the Context of the Category when interpreting.

descriptionTranslations.en: Roll on Meaning Tables to interpret the Element. Consider the Context of the Category when interpreting.

entries.description: If this Category has Custom Elements, roll 1d10 on the Situation's custom List. If there are no Custom Elements, treat as Random.

descriptionTranslations.en: If this Category has Custom Elements, roll 1d10 on the Situation's custom List. If there are no Custom Elements, treat as Random.

entries.description: This is the final Event in this Situation. Interpret the Event knowing it will end. For this Category, also treat as Expected.

descriptionTranslations.en: This is the final Event in this Situation. Interpret the Event knowing it will end. For this Category, also treat as Expected.

entries.description: Roll on the Special Elements table.

descriptionTranslations.en: Roll on the Special Elements table.

entries.description: If this Category has Custom Elements, roll 1d10 + Progress Points on the Situation's custom List. If there are no Custom Elements, treat as Expected.

descriptionTranslations.en: If this Category has Custom Elements, roll 1d10 + Progress Points on the Situation's custom List. If there are no Custom Elements, treat as Expected.

entries.description: This is the final Event in this Situation. Interpret the Event knowing it will end. For this Category, also treat as Expected.

descriptionTranslations.en: This is the final Event in this Situation. Interpret the Event knowing it will end. For this Category, also treat as Expected.

entries.description: The Element is Expected. Instead of adding a Progress Point, subtract 6 Progress Points from this Category.

descriptionTranslations.en: The Element is Expected. Instead of adding a Progress Point, subtract 6 Progress Points from this Category.
